recommendations.title: Summer Camp

recommendations.title: Sleepaway Camp
recommendations.overview: Years after a terrible boating accident, Angela is sent to Camp Arawak where a series of bizarre and violent "accidents" begin to claim the lives of various campers.

recommendations.title: They/Them
recommendations.overview: Campers at an LGBTQ+ conversion camp endure unsettling psychological techniques while the campsite is stalked by a mysterious killer.

recommendations.title: Just Before Dawn
recommendations.overview: In the Oregon mountains, a pair of hunters encounter a machete-wielding killer in an abandoned church. Meanwhile, five campers arrive to examine some property one of them has inherited but are warned by the forest ranger not to venture forth. Soon af

recommendations.title: Simon Says
recommendations.overview: Five college friends choose to spend their vacation debauching at the riverside. They find the perfect place to camp out, but end up crossing paths with twin brothers, Simon and Stanley. The twins then begins to knock off the campers in some extremel

recommendations.title: Tower of Terror
recommendations.overview: A disgraced reporter investigates an abandoned luxury hotel where five people mysteriously disappeared sixty years earlier.

recommendations.title: Suspiria
recommendations.overview: An American newcomer to a prestigious German ballet academy comes to realize that the school is a front for something sinister amid a series of grisly murders.

recommendations.title: Felidae
recommendations.overview: A domestic house cat named Francis investigates the grisly feline murders taking place in his new neighborhood.

recommendations.title: Werewolf

recommendations.title: The Wailer
recommendations.overview: On their way to Mexico, six students are stranded in a small town where years before a tragedy took place.
